MANDATORY SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Aug-13-2002 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: Cause assigned to Dept. 218 for settlement conference. Judge: L. Norris, Clerk: A. Huie, Reporter: D. Neville. Linda N. Reyes appeared on behalf of plaintiff and no appearance for defendant. Court took matter off settlement conference calendar. Trial date of AUG-19-2002 confirmed.

Hearing On Claim Of Right To Possession
Off Calendar Jun-17-2002 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Ronald L. Hawkins, claimant and moving party, was present in propria persona.

Ronald L. Hawkins was affirmed and testified on his own behalf. The Court found that Mr. Hawkins has a right to possession and upholds that claim. Order signed in open court. Honorable Paul H. Alvarado Reporter: Robert Balian, CSR 5220
